summary: Iteration 15: NotificationsPage and Communication section testing. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All required elements present and functional. Search and type filters working. Compose dialog with all fields. Resend email integration is LIVE.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility enhancement recommended

critical_code_review_comments: NotificationsPage correctly implements all required data-testid attributes
Sidebar COMMUNICATION section with Messagerie link present
Stats cards (Total envoyés, Réussis, Aujourd'hui) properly display
Search filter (notif-search) working - filters by email/subject
Type filter (notif-type-filter) working - filters by notification type
Compose button (compose-btn) opens dialog with recipient, subject, message fields
Bulk buttons (bulk-payment-btn, bulk-review-btn) present and functional
Email logs are expandable with detailed info (Destinataire, Type, Statut, Date, Référence)
seed_data_creation: Test email sent to antoine.paucod@the-coach.pro for iteration 15 testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: NotificationsPage fully functional at /notifications. 7 notification logs in DB. Email sending works via Resend API (only antoine.paucod@the-coach.pro is verified). Bulk operations work but will fail for unverified member emails (expected Resend limitation).

backend_endpoints.POST_send_payment_reminder_valid: PASS - Works (500 if email not verified on Resend)
backend_endpoints.POST_send_review_reminder_valid: PASS - Works (400/500 if email not verified)
backend_endpoints.log_structure_verification: PASS - type, recipient, subject, status, sent_at fields
backend_endpoints.GET_members_for_compose: PASS - Returns member list for recipient selector

resend_integration_notes: Resend API is LIVE with verified domain thecoachswitzerland.ch. Sender: contact@thecoachswitzerland.ch. Only antoine.paucod@the-coach.pro can receive emails in free tier. Other recipients return 500 (expected Resend behavior).
